inputs.label: Nominal Dimension
inputs.businessContext: Nominal dimension in thou (thousandths of an inch) to be converted

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal dimension in thou (thousandths of an inch) to be converted
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüştürülecek binlik inç cinsinden nominal boyut
businessContext_i18n.de: Nennmaß in Tausendstel Zoll (thou), das umgerechnet werden soll
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dimension nominale en mils (millièmes de pouce) à convertir
Limite de tolérance supérieure en mils

inputs.label: Lower Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Lower tolerance limit in thou (use negative value if below nominal)

businessContext_i18n.en: Lower tolerance limit in thou (use negative value if below nominal)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alt tolerans limiti (nominalin altındaysa negatif değer kullanın)
businessContext_i18n.de: Untere Toleranzgrenze in Tausendstel Zoll (negativer Wert, wenn unter Nennmaß)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Limite de tolérance inférieure en mils (utiliser une valeur négative si inférieure au nominal)

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Fixed conversion factor from thou to millimeters (1 thou = 0.0254 mm)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed conversion factor from thou to millimeters (1 thou = 0.0254 mm)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Binlik inçten milimetreye sabit dönüşüm faktörü (1 binlik inç = 0,0254 mm)
businessContext_i18n.de: Fester Umrechnungsfaktor von Tausendstel Zoll in Millimeter (1 thou = 0,0254 mm)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion fixe des mils en millimètres (1 mil = 0,0254 mm)

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding results

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding results
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonuçların yuvarlanması için ondalık basamak sayısı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour l'arrondi des résultats
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear resultados

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
